title: Moses App Catalog Manifest
description: Schema for apps/<category>/<subcategory>/<slug>/manifest.yaml in the moses-app-catalog repo. Git-native model: apps are referenced by upstream Git repo + tag + commit SHA. Moses instances clone this catalog, then build each app from its source repository per cluster.

schemaVersion.description: Manifest schema version. Bump on breaking changes.

toolKey.description: Globally unique slug. Must equal the parent directory name under apps/<category>/<subcategory>/. Lowercase, must start with a letter, alphanumerics, hyphens, and underscores only.

displayName.description: Human-readable name shown in the Marketplace UI.

description.description: Short description shown on listing cards and the detail page.

category.description: Top-level category key. MUST match a key under `categories:` in categories.yaml.

subcategory.description: Subcategory key. MUST match a key under the chosen category in categories.yaml.

repositoryType.description: Source hosting. Both choices require a public repositoryUrl.

repositoryUrl.description: Public HTTPS URL to the source repository. Moses clones this URL per cluster to build the app.

iconUrl.description: Optional HTTPS URL to a square icon (SVG preferred, PNG >=128px acceptable). Typically pinned to a specific commit (e.g. raw.githubusercontent.com/<org>/<repo>/<commit>/icon.svg).

maintainers.description: People responsible for this listing. At least one with role: owner is required.

email.description: Contact email. Kept for maintainer correspondence; not rendered in the public Marketplace UI.

license.description: SPDX license identifier for the app source code (see https://spdx.org/licenses/).
